description_long: This is a single-story suburban house with a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a neatly maintained lawn and several medium-sized trees at the front. The house features a low-pitched, gable roof with a muted green color, and the exterior walls are finished in a soft pink hue. A wide driveway leads up to a two-car garage attached to the right side of the house, with a paved walkway branching off toward the main entrance. The front entryway is centrally located, flanked by shrubs and partially shaded by the trees, and includes a small stoop with steps. Windows are symmetrically arranged on the front facade, providing a balanced and inviting appearance. The property is bordered by a sidewalk and a street, typical of a residential neighborhood setting.
description: A single-story pink house with a green gable roof, attached garage, and symmetrical front windows, set among trees and a lawn with a wide driveway.
description_view_0: From this angle, the house is seen from above and behind, highlighting the driveway, garage, and the rear portion of the property.
description_view_1: This front-facing view shows the symmetrical facade, main entryway, and the row of trees lining the front lawn.
description_view_2: Viewed from the opposite side, the garage and driveway are prominent, with the house and trees receding into the background.
description_view_3: A direct street-facing view emphasizes the main entrance, front lawn, and the symmetrical arrangement of trees and windows.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with small stoop, steps, and flanking shrubs, partially shaded by trees
